name: RPlog_The_Truth_Comes_Out
title: The Handler in the Hotel Room
summary: On the rebel world of New Alderaan, the undercover Imperial stormtrooper Brek Halsmer is approached in a garden by the affable Rainer and his Trandoshan associate Lessan, who try to recruit Brek and the off-duty hospital medic Myiari Oerstead for shady, well-paid work. Both decline, Brek bluntly calling the pitch 'sith spit,' and the recruiters depart. Later, Brek returns to his hotel room to find Rainer waiting in the dark, and the genial broker drops his disguise: he is in fact a Lieutenant of Imperial Intelligence who knows Brek's secret. Revealing that Myiari is connected to a man who has killed many stormtroopers, Rainer reasserts command, ordering Brek to attention and tasking him to continue cultivating his friendship with the medic and her Senator associate as a spy, leaving coded reports in laundry. Shaken, Brek pledges his loyalty to the Emperor and renounces his feelings for Myiari, asking only to learn the names of the troopers she helped kill.
